response.justification: Candidate has only ~6 months of professional C++ exposure (National Instruments, 2014–2015) and a university thesis project, far short of the 5–10 years of hands-on C++ required. No Windows-platform C++ work, no SQL Server or Oracle experience (databases listed are MongoDB and MySQL), and no capital markets, investment banking, or fixed-income domain background. Strengths are in TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web/mobile work — none of which map to this role's mandatory requirements.
strengths: 13+ years of overall software development experience across multiple stacks
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, pairing
Some low-latency systems exposure (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic data integration)
concerns: Only ~6 months of professional C++ experience, over a decade ago
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; databases used are MongoDB/MySQL
No capital markets, investment banking, or fixed-income domain background

key_factors.factor: Insufficient C++ experience vs. 5–10 year requirement
Missing required SQL Server/Oracle and Windows platform background
No financial services or capital markets domain exposure
